title: digitaria heterantha subsp. meyeniana
intro: Digitaria heterantha subsp. meyeniana, also known as Mayen's finger grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Digitaria heterantha subsp. meyeniana is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
